---
name: Documentation
description: Add or improve technical or user documentation
labels: ["type:documentation"]
title: "[Docs] "
---

## Summary
Describe what documentation is needed.

## Audience
Who this is for (developers, users, contributors).

## Deliverable
Files/sections to create or update.

## Roadmap Source Metadata
- Source file:
- Roadmap task ID/title:
- Phase:
- Priority:
- Dependencies: (for example: Depends on #123)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Content is accurate and current.
- [ ] Links and references are valid.
- [ ] Examples/steps are clear.

## Notes
Context, references, and related issues.
